name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
ℹ️ Here's how CryptoWatch works:

• Add coins to your watchlist to track prices
• Set threshold alerts — get notified when a coin goes above or below a price
• Set percentage alerts — get notified when a coin moves by a certain %
• Check current prices anytime with /price or the Price check button
• Set quiet hours to silence alerts overnight

Examples:
Threshold: "Alert me when BTC goes above $100,000"
Percentage: "Alert me when ETH moves 5% or more in 1 hour"

Tap /start to open the menu and get started.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
